question: How many times did I ride rollercoasters across all the events I attended from July to October?

judge_response.label: CORRECT
judge_response.reasoning: The retrieved context lists specific rollercoaster rides from July to October that total 10 rides: 3 at SeaWorld San Diego in July (Kraken, Mako, Manta), 3 times on Space Mountain in September, 3 times on Revenge of the Mummy in October, and 1 time on Xcelerator in October, which matches the gold answer of 10 times.
